projectDescription: A high-performance Python library for analyzing USDA Forest Inventory and Analysis (FIA) data, built on DuckDB and Polars with design-based statistical methods that match EVALIDator exactly.
keyFeatures: One-line data download from USDA FIA DataMart for any US state
Design-based estimation matching EVALIDator statistical output exactly
10–100x faster than EVALIDator web UI via DuckDB and Polars backends
Estimators for area, volume, biomass, carbon, TPA, mortality, growth, and removals
EVALID-based filtering for statistically valid plot groupings
Spatial filtering and grouping using polygon boundaries (GeoJSON, Shapefile, GeoPackage)
MotherDuck cloud database support for serverless access
Flexible domain filtering with SQL-style expressions
EVALIDator API client for cross-validation of estimates
Reference table joins for human-readable species, forest type, and state names
publicApiSurface: FIA(db_path) — main database class
FIA.from_download(states) — download and connect in one call
FIA.clip_by_state(state) — filter by US state FIPS code
FIA.clip_most_recent(eval_type) — filter to most recent evaluation
FIA.clip_by_evalid(evalid) — filter to specific EVALID(s)
FIA.clip_by_polygon(polygon) — spatial filter by polygon boundary
FIA.intersect_polygons(polygon, attributes) — spatial join for grouping
FIA.query(sql) — execute raw read-only SQL
download(states, dir, common, tables, force) — download FIA data from DataMart
area(db, land_type, area_domain, grp_by, totals) — forest area estimation
tpa(db, tree_type, land_type, tree_domain, grp_by, by_size_class, totals) — trees per acre
volume(db, vol_type, tree_type, land_type, tree_domain, grp_by, totals) — volume estimation
biomass(db, component, tree_type, land_type, tree_domain, grp_by, totals) — biomass estimation
mortality(db, measure, tree_type, land_type, tree_domain, grp_by) — annual mortality
growth(db, measure, tree_type, land_type, tree_domain, grp_by) — net growth estimation
removals(db, measure, tree_type, land_type, tree_domain, grp_by) — harvest removals
site_index(db, grp_by) — site productivity index
area_change(db, grp_by) — area change over time
panel(db, eval_type, grp_by) — panel-based estimates
join_species_names(data, db) — add species common names to results
join_forest_type_names(data, db) — add forest type names to results
join_state_names(data, db) — add state names to results
EVALIDatorClient — API client for official USFS estimates
validate_pyfia_estimate(db, estimate_type, state, year) — validate against EVALIDator
PyFIASettings — configuration via environment variables (PYFIA_*)
MotherDuckFIA(database, motherduck_token) — cloud database connection
